MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2022 Vacated

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jul-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

Plaintiff Citibank, N.A.'s unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings against Defendant Marina J. Chuquin is granted.

Order and judgment are filed.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Set For Trial On Oct-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted, Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted:

The Motion is granted: the truth of all specified facts in the Request for Admissions, Set One, propounded by plaintiff CITIBANK, N A. on defendant Mariana J Chuquinby by mail on December 15, 2021, be deemed admitted.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling via email to tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted, Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Continued To May-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
